title: Caddywack
description:
Overview:Caddywack is an arcade driving game about total car mastery. Drift, launch, and chain aerial tricks through two ways to play: Gridlock Mode, a horde-survival arena where your driving skill is the only thing keeping you alive, and an open city sandbox of taxi missions and combo-chain score chasing.

Design:Everything in Caddywack runs on one skill: expressive, momentum-driven driving. Drift through tight spaces, launch off ramps, land tricks, and keep your flow alive. Master it once, and the game gives you two places to prove it.

In Gridlock Mode, the city fights back. Survive escalating waves of hostile traffic in a survivors-style arena where every drift, jump, and trick becomes a survival tool. Carve through the swarm, escape closing rings, and stack auto-firing weapons and upgrades as each run spirals into beautiful chaos.

In the open city, chase the perfect run. Accept passenger jobs, optimize routes, chain tricks to extend combo multipliers, and hunt high scores across a dense sandbox built for flow, speed, and replayable mastery.
description_short: Caddywack is an arcade driving game about total car mastery. Drift, launch, and chain tricks through two ways to play: Gridlock Mode, a horde-survival arena where driving is your weapon, and an open city sandbox of taxi missions and combo-chain score chasing.
